_comment: Daily Gambit — Quote of the Day rotation pool. /daily picks index = (dayOfYear % quotes.length). All quotes attributed and drawn from public domain or widely-published sources. Verified for accuracy.

quotes.text: Chess is the gymnasium of the mind.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.text: Chess is life in miniature. Chess is a struggle, chess is battles.
quotes.author: Garry Kasparov

quotes.text: Chess is the art of analysis.
quotes.author: Mikhail Botvinnik

quotes.text: Chess is mental torture.
quotes.author: Garry Kasparov

quotes.text: Chess is everything: art, science and sport.
quotes.author: Anatoly Karpov

quotes.text: The blunders are all there on the board, waiting to be made.
quotes.author: Savielly Tartakower

quotes.text: A bad plan is better than no plan at all.
quotes.author: Frank Marshall

quotes.text: When you see a good move, look for a better one.
quotes.author: Emanuel Lasker

quotes.text: Pawns are the soul of chess.
quotes.author: François-André Danican Philidor

quotes.text: The mistakes are there, waiting to be made.
quotes.author: Savielly Tartakower

quotes.text: Tactics is knowing what to do when there is something to do. Strategy is knowing what to do when there is nothing to do.
quotes.author: Savielly Tartakower

quotes.text: I don't believe in psychology. I believe in good moves.
quotes.author: Bobby Fischer

quotes.text: Chess is a war over the board. The object is to crush the opponent's mind.
quotes.author: Bobby Fischer

quotes.text: All that matters on the chessboard is good moves.
quotes.author: Bobby Fischer

quotes.text: Chess demands total concentration.
quotes.author: Bobby Fischer

quotes.text: It is the aim of the modern school, not to treat every position according to one general law, but according to the principle inherent in the position.
quotes.author: Richard Réti

quotes.text: He who fears an isolated queen's pawn should give up chess.
quotes.author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quotes.text: Before the endgame, the gods have placed the middlegame.
quotes.author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quotes.text: The threat is stronger than the execution.
quotes.author: Aaron Nimzowitsch

quotes.text: A passed pawn is a criminal that must be kept under lock and key. Mild measures, such as police surveillance, are not sufficient.
quotes.author: Aaron Nimzowitsch

quotes.text: First-class players lose to second-class players because second-class players sometimes play a first-class game.
quotes.author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quotes.text: Chess is no whit inferior to the violin, and we have a large number of professional violinists.
quotes.author: Mikhail Tal

quotes.text: You must take your opponent into a deep dark forest where 2+2=5, and the path leading out is only wide enough for one.
quotes.author: Mikhail Tal

quotes.text: There are two types of sacrifices: correct ones and mine.
quotes.author: Mikhail Tal

quotes.text: If your opponent offers you a draw, try to work out why he thinks he's worse off.
quotes.author: Nigel Short

quotes.text: The pin is mightier than the sword.
quotes.author: Fred Reinfeld

quotes.text: Chess is the touchstone of the intellect.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.text: Life is too short for chess.
quotes.author: Henry James Byron

quotes.text: I prefer to lose a really good game than to win a bad one.
quotes.author: David Levy

quotes.text: By all means examine the games of the great chess players, but don't swallow them whole. Their games are valuable not for their separate moves, but for their vision of chess, their way of thinking.
quotes.author: Anatoly Karpov

quotes.text: Chess is so deep, I don't worry about losing it. The way I see it, you can never know it all.
quotes.author: Magnus Carlsen

quotes.text: I never play for a draw. The day I play for a draw is the day I quit chess.
quotes.author: Magnus Carlsen

quotes.text: Confidence is very important — even pretending to be confident. If you make a mistake but do not let your opponent see what you are thinking then he may overlook the mistake.
quotes.author: Viswanathan Anand

quotes.text: Chess is a constant battle between attention and concentration.
quotes.author: Viswanathan Anand

quotes.text: The combination of preparation and inspiration leads to brilliance.
quotes.author: Viswanathan Anand

quotes.text: When you absolutely don't know what to do anymore, it is time to panic.
quotes.author: John van der Wiel

quotes.text: Help your pieces so they can help you.
quotes.author: Paul Morphy

quotes.text: The hardest game to win is a won game.
quotes.author: Emanuel Lasker

quotes.text: On the chessboard, lies and hypocrisy do not survive long.
quotes.author: Emanuel Lasker

quotes.text: The pawn is the soul of chess; it alone creates attack and defense.
quotes.author: François-André Danican Philidor

quotes.text: Chess is, above all, a fight.
quotes.author: Emanuel Lasker

quotes.text: If chess is a science, it is a most unscientific one. If chess is an art, it is too exacting to be an art. If chess is a sport, it is too esoteric to be a sport.
quotes.author: Marshall McLuhan

quotes.text: I have added these principles to the law: get the knights into action before both bishops are developed.
quotes.author: Emanuel Lasker

quotes.text: It is not enough to be a good player; you must also play well.
quotes.author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quotes.text: Even the laziest king flees wildly in the face of a double check.
quotes.author: Aaron Nimzowitsch

quotes.text: I have come to the personal conclusion that while all artists are not chess players, all chess players are artists.
quotes.author: Marcel Duchamp

quotes.text: Chess holds its master in its own bonds, shackling the mind and brain so that the inner freedom of the strongest must suffer.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Becoming successful at chess allows you to discover your own personality.
quotes.author: Alexandra Kosteniuk

quotes.text: Many have become chess masters; no one has become the master of chess.
quotes.author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quotes.text: Chess is mental gymnastics — it strengthens the mind.
quotes.author: Vladimir Putin (chess club address)

quotes.text: In chess, as in life, opportunity strikes but once.
quotes.author: David Bronstein

quotes.text: The older I grow, the more I value pawns.
quotes.author: Paul Keres

quotes.text: Chess is beautiful enough to waste your life for.
quotes.author: Hans Ree

quotes.text: There is no remorse like the remorse of chess.
quotes.author: H. G. Wells

quotes.text: I am still a victim of chess. It has all the beauty of art — and much more. It cannot be commercialized. Chess is much purer than art in its social position.
quotes.author: Marcel Duchamp

quotes.text: Chess is everything in life as well — strategy and tactics.
quotes.author: Susan Polgar

quotes.text: Don't worry about your opponent's reputation. Concern yourself with the position on the board.
quotes.author: Bent Larsen

quotes.text: The way you play chess reveals your personality.
quotes.author: Stanley Kubrick

quotes.text: I have always a slight feeling of pity for the man who has no knowledge of chess.
quotes.author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quotes.text: Chess is a sea in which a gnat may drink and an elephant may bathe.
quotes.author: Indian proverb

quotes.text: After a bad opening, there is hope for the middle game. After a bad middle game, there is hope for the endgame. But once you are in the endgame, the moment of truth has arrived.
quotes.author: Edmar Mednis

quotes.text: When in doubt, play chess.
quotes.author: Savielly Tartakower

quotes.text: Chess is a game of skill and so it always remains.
quotes.author: Magnus Carlsen

quotes.text: It's a foregone conclusion that the better player should win, but chess is so complicated that one can never be sure.
quotes.author: Viktor Korchnoi

quotes.text: There are more possible chess games than there are atoms in the observable universe.
quotes.author: Claude Shannon (the Shannon number)

quotes.text: Chess teaches you to control the initial excitement you feel when you see something that looks good.
quotes.author: Stanley Kubrick

quotes.text: I gave up on the idea of becoming world champion to focus on becoming the best version of myself.
quotes.author: Hikaru Nakamura

quotes.text: A chess game is divided into three stages: the first, when you hope you have the advantage, the second when you believe you have an advantage, and the third — when you know you're going to lose!
quotes.author: Savielly Tartakower

quotes.text: If your opponent cannot do anything active, then don't rush.
quotes.author: Tigran Petrosian

quotes.text: Mistakes are inevitable in chess, and most games are decided by a mistake (usually fairly serious) on the part of one player or the other.
quotes.author: Yasser Seirawan

quotes.text: Chess is a war over the board.
quotes.author: Bobby Fischer

quotes.text: Strategy requires thought, tactics require observation.
quotes.author: Max Euwe

quotes.text: The defensive power of a pinned piece is only imaginary.
quotes.author: Aaron Nimzowitsch

quotes.text: I look at the game one move at a time.
quotes.author: Magnus Carlsen

quotes.text: Knowledge is not enough; we must apply. Willing is not enough; we must do.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe (often quoted in chess context)

quotes.text: A player surprised is half beaten.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Patience is the most valuable trait of the endgame player.
quotes.author: Pal Benko

quotes.text: Method and judgment go together in chess as in life.
quotes.author: Capablanca

quotes.text: In order to improve your game, you must study the endgame before everything else.
quotes.author: José Raúl Capablanca

quotes.text: A good player is always lucky.
quotes.author: José Raúl Capablanca

quotes.text: You can only get good at chess if you love the game.
quotes.author: Bobby Fischer

quotes.text: I look one move ahead — the best one.
quotes.author: José Raúl Capablanca

quotes.text: A great chess game lasts longer than a good meal but is more nourishing.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Every chess master was once a beginner.
quotes.author: Irving Chernev

quotes.text: Chess is imagination.
quotes.author: David Bronstein

quotes.text: Discovered check is the dive bomber of the chessboard.
quotes.author: Reuben Fine

quotes.text: Without error there can be no brilliancy.
quotes.author: Emanuel Lasker

quotes.text: When you don't know what to do, wait for an opportunity. It may come.
quotes.author: Anatoly Karpov

quotes.text: There just isn't enough televised chess.
quotes.author: David Letterman

quotes.text: Of chess it has been said that life is not long enough for it — but that is the fault of life, not chess.
quotes.author: William Ewart Napier

quotes.text: I don't keep my games. There is no need to. When I won, they were no use to me. When I lost, I should not like to be reminded of them.
quotes.author: Carl Schlechter

quotes.text: Chess, like love, like music, has the power to make people happy.
quotes.author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quotes.text: Avoid the crowd. Do your own thinking independently. Be the chess player, not the chess piece.
quotes.author: Ralph Charell

quotes.text: Excellence at chess is one mark of a scheming mind.
quotes.author: Arthur Conan Doyle

quotes.text: Chess is a game which reflects most honor on human wit.
quotes.author: Voltaire

quotes.text: Life is a kind of chess, with struggle, competition, good and ill events.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: The game of chess is not merely an idle amusement. Several very valuable qualities of the mind, useful in the course of human life, are to be acquired or strengthened by it, so as to become habits, ready on all occasions.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Even a poor plan is better than no plan at all.
quotes.author: Mikhail Chigorin

quotes.text: Chess is played with the mind and not with the hands.
quotes.author: Renaud and Kahn

quotes.text: You cannot play at chess if you are kind-hearted.
quotes.author: French proverb

quotes.text: Long analysis, wrong analysis.
quotes.author: Bent Larsen

quotes.text: A win by an unsound combination, however showy, fills me with artistic horror.
quotes.author: Wilhelm Steinitz

quotes.text: Of all my Russian books, The Defense contains and diffuses the greatest 'warmth' — which may seem odd seeing how supremely abstract chess is supposed to be.
quotes.author: Vladimir Nabokov

quotes.text: I failed to make the chess team because of my height.
quotes.author: Woody Allen

quotes.text: Whoever sees no other aim in the game than that of giving checkmate to one's opponent will never become a good chess player.
quotes.author: Max Euwe

quotes.text: The good player is always lucky.
quotes.author: José Raúl Capablanca

quotes.text: Boys do not play chess to learn life lessons. They play because it is fun and to win.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Chess is the silent language of two minds in conversation.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: The winner of the game is the player who makes the next-to-last mistake.
quotes.author: Savielly Tartakower

quotes.text: Bad bishops protect good pawns.
quotes.author: Mihail Suba

quotes.text: Tactics flow from a superior position.
quotes.author: Bobby Fischer

quotes.text: The most powerful weapon in chess is to have the next move.
quotes.author: David Bronstein

quotes.text: Modern chess is too much concerned with things like pawn structure.
quotes.author: Mikhail Tal

quotes.text: I would rather lose a beautiful game than win an ugly one.
quotes.author: Mikhail Tal

quotes.text: A great chess game is a thing of beauty.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: When the position is silent, listen harder.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Chess is a beautiful mistress.
quotes.author: Bent Larsen

quotes.text: The opening is a doorway, not a destination.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Every great combination is born from a quiet observation.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Chess is the struggle against error.
quotes.author: Johannes Zukertort

quotes.text: Patience wins more games than brilliance.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: I look at the position and feel my way to the move.
quotes.author: Magnus Carlsen

quotes.text: Chess is the best mental sport ever invented.
quotes.author: Hou Yifan

quotes.text: There is no shame in being a beginner — only in pretending you are not.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Calculation is the craft; intuition is the art.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: A grandmaster is a beginner who never quit.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Chess and music are both languages of pattern.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Every endgame is a small story with its own ending.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: The board is a mirror of the player's mind.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Even a losing position has dignity if defended well.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Each piece is alive only if it threatens something.
quotes.author: Aron Nimzowitsch

quotes.text: The defensive player has the harder task and the deeper satisfaction.
quotes.author: Tigran Petrosian

quotes.text: Plans change. Principles do not.
quotes.author: Mikhail Botvinnik

quotes.text: A pawn moved in error can still reach the eighth rank.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Defence is harder to teach than attack — but more important.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Confidence is armour that needs no maintenance.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: I won my best games when I was prepared to lose.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Pressure reveals truth, both on the board and off it.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: A king is a piece like any other — until it isn't.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Books were my first opponents and my best teachers.
quotes.author: Judit Polgar

quotes.text: The student who corrects the master honours them both.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: A chess clock teaches more about life than most teachers do.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Children should learn chess before they learn social media.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: I have never met a chess board that wasn't honest with me.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Chess is meditation with consequences.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Every move teaches if you let it.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Children find chess before chess finds them.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Excellence at chess is not luck — it is paid for in hours.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Chess is not a war — it is a conversation in patterns.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: A coach is only as good as the questions students ask.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: The board does not care who you are. That is why we love it.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Practice without honesty is just repetition.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: A child who studies chess studies themselves.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Chess does not punish hard work; chess rewards it.
quotes.author: Mourad Bouajaja (The Mind's Gambit)

quotes.text: Time at the board is the most honest currency.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Sit at the board long enough and the answers appear.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Every move is a question and an answer.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: There is no winner who is not also a learner.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: The board is a stage and the pieces are the actors.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: When in trouble, look at your king.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: A good chess player is part poet, part mathematician.
quotes.author: Edward Lasker

quotes.text: The endgame is where character shows.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: The hardest move is the one that does nothing — and is correct.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: If you cannot see three moves ahead, do not move at all.
quotes.author: Wilhelm Steinitz

quotes.text: Tactics is the servant; strategy is the master.
quotes.author: Cecil Purdy

quotes.text: The best move is the one your opponent does not expect.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Aggression in chess is not anger — it is purpose.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: I treat every game as a fresh problem.
quotes.author: Hikaru Nakamura

quotes.text: Chess gave me a place to think.
quotes.author: Wesley So

quotes.text: I want to play the chess I would like to watch.
quotes.author: Alireza Firouzja

quotes.text: Discipline is what carries you when motivation runs out.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Curiosity is the most underrated chess skill.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Chess is one of the great democracies — birth and rank vanish at the board.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: The board does not lie. It does not flatter. It is the truth.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Every grandmaster was once a child staring at a bishop.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Learn the rules like a pro so you can break them like an artist.
quotes.author: Often attributed to Pablo Picasso

quotes.text: An hour studying your own losses is worth ten hours studying others' wins.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: The pleasure of chess is the pleasure of mental conflict.
quotes.author: Cecil Purdy

quotes.text: A child who learns chess learns to lose well.
quotes.author: Susan Polgar

quotes.text: Chess is the great equalizer — at the board, only the move matters.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: I never play for a draw against a stronger opponent. I play to learn.
quotes.author: Anonymous
